prompt_text:
### Demographics: 66-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 21 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool); Nausea, reduced appetite, and fatigue over the last 1-2 months with ongoing renal function decline.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Liraglutide 1.8mg once daily; Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 66.7 kg; Height 175.3 cm; BMI 21.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 141/87 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.9%; 9 months ago 8.5%; 6 months ago 8.0%; 3 months ago 7.5%; current 6.8%), FPG (12 months ago 208mg/dL; 9 months ago 203mg/dL; 6 months ago 201mg/dL; 3 months ago 152mg/dL; current 150mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 67.7kg; 9 months ago 62.6kg; 6 months ago 61.2kg; 3 months ago 60.9kg; current 66.7kg), Height (12 months ago 175.3cm; 9 months ago 175.3cm; 6 months ago 175.3cm; 3 months ago 175.3cm; current 175.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 21.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 137mmHg; 9 months ago 135mmHg; 6 months ago 136mmHg; 3 months ago 137mmHg; current 141mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 89mmHg; 9 months ago 88mmHg; 6 months ago 87mmHg; 3 months ago 87mmHg; current 87mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 65U/L; 9 months ago 54U/L; 6 months ago 50U/L; 3 months ago 49U/L; current 60U/L), AST (12 months ago 39U/L; 9 months ago 44U/L; 6 months ago 42U/L; 3 months ago 35U/L; current 43U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 13mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 14mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 13mL/min/1.73m²; current 10mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 342mg/g; 9 months ago 365mg/g; 6 months ago 332mg/g; 3 months ago 333mg/g; current 437mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 76mg/dL; 9 months ago 78mg/dL; 6 months ago 83mg/dL; 3 months ago 79mg/dL; current 80mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 55mg/dL; 9 months ago 59mg/dL; 6 months ago 59mg/dL; 3 months ago 55mg/dL; current 57mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 154mg/dL; 9 months ago 134mg/dL; 6 months ago 149mg/dL; 3 months ago 156mg/dL; current 144mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 10.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.41 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
